news.headline: As millions lose weight on GLP-1s, they're starting to turn to retailers to refresh their wardrobes
news.summary: Apparel retailers could see an up to $13 billion annual boost in spending because of GLP-1 drugs, according to an estimate by equity research firm Bernstein.

news.headline: Olympic skier Lindsey Vonn doesn't rule out the 2030 games: 'I would only do it if I could be fast'
news.summary: Lindsey Vonn told CNBC Sport she's not ruling out a return to the Olympics in 2030, at age 45, if she can still perform at a high level.
